entries.name: do-it-skills-index
entries.description: Generated compact index for lazy do-it skill discovery.

entries.name: do-it-router
entries.description: Use when any non-trivial repo task needs Light, Standard, or Heavy tier selection, failure-mode forecast, path map, and the minimum useful do-it workflow before action.

entries.name: do-it-planning
entries.description: Use when intent must become a durable handoff card with current truth, acceptance criteria, risks, path map, and verification expectations.

entries.name: do-it-slicing
entries.description: Use when a large plan needs independent vertical slices with explicit ownership, verification, review, rollback, and stop conditions.

entries.name: do-it-grill
entries.description: Use when hidden assumptions or user-only decisions need fact verification before planning, implementation, or closeout.

entries.name: do-it-context
entries.description: Use when repo terms or invariants are drifting, or when user/docs/code naming disagrees and a canonical glossary is needed — `.do-it/CONTEXT.md` is the downstream source of truth for names, relationships, and facts.

entries.name: do-it-brainstorm
entries.description: Use when planning needs divergent product and architecture option mapping before grill converges on decisions.

entries.name: do-it-architecture-scan
entries.description: Use when a change touches multiple packages or surfaces and you need to audit ownership, dependency direction, coupling, migration, rollout risk, or failure isolation before planning.

entries.name: do-it-interface-drill
entries.description: Use when API, schema, CLI, or protocol changes must be checked across producer and consumer contract boundaries before merge.

entries.name: do-it-tdd
entries.description: Use when a behavior change needs a failing regression or contract test before implementation.

entries.name: do-it-debugging
entries.description: Use when a bug's root cause is unclear or prior fixes failed and you need a hypothesis, instrumentation, falsification, root fix, and regression proof.

entries.name: do-it-subagent-orchestration
entries.description: Use when delegated agents need exact scope, write ownership, forbidden paths, must-verify facts, stop condition, and return schema.

entries.name: do-it-review-loop
entries.description: Use when a delivered diff or worker result needs PR-style correctness review before the parent accepts it.

entries.name: do-it-fix-loop
entries.description: Use when review findings or regressions need atomic repair and the same-scope review must repeat until Blocking and Important findings are clear.

entries.name: do-it-verification-gate
entries.description: Use when any done, fixed, passing, ready, install, or merge claim needs fresh command evidence from the current branch or worktree.

entries.name: do-it-worktree-isolation
entries.description: Use when risky, long, or parallel work needs an isolated git worktree to protect the main checkout and simplify rollback.

entries.name: do-it-branch-closeout
entries.description: Use when closing a branch, PR, merge, or cleanup and you must name scope, verification evidence, integration steps, and rollback notes before merge.

entries.name: do-it-skill-authoring
entries.description: Use when creating or updating do-it skills and you need clear triggers, return shape, workflow interactions, escape behavior, and hook integration.

entries.name: do-it-handbook
entries.description: Use when a project needs a durable `.do-it/handbook/` skeleton for architecture, invariants, glossary, code map, backlog, and runtime status.

entries.name: do-it-comments-discipline
entries.description: Use when code comments are authored or reviewed and must be checked as anchors, invariants, cross-file references, or tool directives instead of narrative.

entries.name: architect-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-grill architecture scan for boundaries, coupling, rollout risk, and durable design tradeoffs.

entries.name: architecture-strategist
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm as the required architecture core lens for foundation, extension modules, boundaries, and stage closure.

entries.name: architecture-taste-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop or do-it-planning to audit research-first compliance for plans/diffs that introduce new dependencies, datastores, frameworks, or protocols.

entries.name: ceo-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm for read-only product/business perspective on value, market window, revenue path, pivot cost, and competitive pressure.

entries.name: code-mapper
entries.description: Use when do-it-router needs a token-bounded map of owning files, call paths, branch points, and unknowns before edits.

entries.name: code-quality-cleaner
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only maintainability review of redundancy, dead paths, weak abstractions, and cleanup risk.

entries.name: domain-language-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only review of domain terms, canonical language, naming drift, and model contradictions.

entries.name: documentation-engineer
entries.description: Use for do-it documentation delivery when docs must match current tooling, install flow, adapters, and operator workflows.

entries.name: end-user-advocate
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm for read-only end-user perspective on real usage scenarios, pain points, mental-model mismatch, workarounds, and error recovery.

entries.name: install-release-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only review of package install, manifest, doctor, release, and local deployment readiness.

entries.name: ops-sre
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm for read-only operations / reliability perspective on deployment, observability, failure recovery, scaling, on-call burden, and rollback.

entries.name: plan-challenger
entries.description: Use during do-it-grill to challenge assumptions, scope, acceptance criteria, alternatives, and routing before implementation.

entries.name: product-strategist
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm as the required product core lens for product boundary, core goal, requirement shape, and option tradeoffs.

entries.name: react-specialist
entries.description: Use for do-it React interface drill or delivery involving component behavior, state flow, rendering, effects, or accessibility.

entries.name: red-team-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only adversarial review of security, state, persistence, concurrency, replay, and failure modes.

entries.name: reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for PR-style correctness review of behavior regressions, security issues, contracts, and missing tests.

entries.name: sql-pro
entries.description: Use for do-it SQL interface drill involving query semantics, migrations, transactions, storage contracts, or performance risk.

entries.name: test-automator
entries.description: Use for do-it test drill when automated coverage, fixtures, harness behavior, or regression tests need focused implementation.

entries.name: tdd-red-writer
entries.description: Use in do-it split RED/GREEN delivery when a separate agent should lock the failing behavior contract before implementation.

entries.name: spec-compliance-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only scope review against the written task, plan, acceptance criteria, and ownership boundary.

entries.name: skill-quality-reviewer
entries.description: Use during do-it-review-loop for read-only review of Codex skill quality, trigger clarity, workflow completeness, and cross-skill consistency.

entries.name: typescript-pro
entries.description: Use for do-it TypeScript interface drill or delivery involving types, APIs, package contracts, and compiler-driven fixes.

entries.name: ux-designer
entries.description: Use during do-it-brainstorm for read-only UI/UX perspective on user flow, discoverability, accessibility, interaction consistency, and visual hierarchy.
